data.body: ROOT CAUSE (confirmed): the .env-id gate was duplicated per-command at the composer/transition layer but absent from the leaf-append path; comment/tag/set_* route through _seam.append_event, and env_id() falls open to '' when .env-id is missing, so a half-init tracker committed events with empty env_id while create/transition rejected. FIX (branch worktree-civil-marlin-flare, commit 15271fce): enforce the gate once at the single append_event seam (through which ALL writes incl. create/edit/link flow). Follow-up commit ecb39aff seeds .env-id in the graph test harness. Pending PR/merge before close.
